author: Jack Princz
name: Wider MLP 3x + int6 Quantization + Sliding Window Eval, val_bpb=1.1659
blurb: 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536) with int6 per-row quantization on MLP and attention weights, int8 on embeddings, zstd-22 compression, and sliding window evaluation at stride=256 with batched forward_logits.
